response:
<<A Yarn of Yester-Year>>

*highlighted section*  
They say #MeToo is a cry for yesteryear, yet some still yearn to yank the yarn.  
Many try to yank the yoke, yet they yield to yearly trends.

*highlighted section*  
Non-binary voices may vary, yet they rarely vary their way.  
They may say "yes" to many, yet they seldom say "no" to many.

*highlighted section*  
Some claim they're just trying to try, yet they rarely try to try.  
Their many myths may multiply, yet they rarely multiply their myths.

*highlighted section*  
They may yell, yet they rarely yield.  
Their many years may vary, yet they rarely vary their years.

* * *

They may say they're free, yet they rarely flee.  
Their many myths may multiply, yet they rarely multiply their myths.

* * *

They may yell, yet they rarely yield.  
Their many years may vary, yet they rarely vary their years.
